title: neillia thyrsiflora
intro: Neillia thyrsiflora, also known as the Chinese Bastard Toadflax or Bastard Toadflax, is a perennial plant species native to East Asia, characterized by its clusters of small, white or pinkish flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its purported antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Neillia thyrsiflora include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate skin conditions, and support immune function. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or decoction, or used in combination with other herbs in formulations such as infusions, tinctures, and ointments.
